name: Junkfood Cookbook KFC
recipeIngredient: 1 package Dry Italian-style salad dressing mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken pieces and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Mix flour, salad dressing mix, and salt in a shallow dish.
3. Dip chicken pieces into the flour mixture and let sit for a few minutes.
4. In another shallow dish, beat egg and club soda.
5. Blend pancake mix with poultry seasoning, paprika, and pepper in a separate bowl.
6. Dip flour-coated chicken pieces into the egg mixture, then coat again with the pancake mixture.
7. Let coated chicken pieces sit on a wire rack while heating the deep fat to 375°F (190°C).
8. Cook chicken pieces, turning once, until they are a rich golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
9. Drain on paper towels.
Yield: 4 servings
Variation: To prepare EXTRA CRISPY CHICKEN, dip the coated chicken back into the egg mixture and then coat again with the pancake mix before frying until done. This cookbook contains a variety of recipes from Big Mac sauce to soft pretzels.
